title: Session close: graduation-candidates-drain complete; both due items graduated; quality gates green
body:
Closing the graduation-candidates-drain session. Both `due` entries in pending-graduations.md graduated this session:

**Phase 1 — Hook-chain re-staging absorbs files post-verify-staged** (captured 2026-05-10 by Quiet Lurking Mask). Owner-selected cure shape iii (classify hook-staged files by intent). Authored PDR-059 (regenerator-output-classification) as a structurally distinct portable doctrine introducing the Class A/B/C taxonomy over hook-staged files. Amended ADR-177 with a dated 2026-05-11 amendment section recording the post-hook classification gate as the host-repo operational application of PDR-059. Amended PDR-054 §Related with a cross-reference to PDR-059. Updated the PDR-059 index row and CHANGELOG. Reviewers: architecture-expert-betty (GO WITH CONDITIONS, 2 doctrine edits applied — Class A/B precedence + negative-knowledge-gate framing); docs-adr-expert (GO); assumptions-expert (GO WITH CONDITIONS, 2 plan-level pre-conditions recorded in the ADR-177 amendment — producer inventory + hook-staged-file definition).

**Phase 2 — ADR-041 amendment: top-level workspace tiers** (captured 2026-05-11 by Dusky Masking Cloak, D-4a). Amended ADR-041 to regularise `agent-tools/` (latent ADR-165/168/178 gap) and add `agent-graphs/` as a top-level tier (ADR-173 prerequisite). Dependency-direction matrix expanded from 6×5 to 8×8; one-line Decision-list note added explaining the libs/foundation+adapter split. Status moved to Accepted (Revised) with dated revision note. Cross-linked from ADR-173 §Open Questions:1 (resolved). Closed D-4a on graph-mvp-arc.plan.md:732 with reviewer attestation tail. Reviewers: architecture-expert-fred (GO, principles-compliant); architecture-expert-betty (GO WITH CONDITIONS, 2 matrix-cell precision edits applied — agent-graphs sdks scope narrowed to `graph-corpus-sdk only`, agent-tools surface scope narrowed to identity/collaboration plumbing exports); docs-adr-expert (GO WITH CONDITIONS, 3 housekeeping items applied — Decision-list note, plan attestation-discipline, register reviewer-tail).

**Phase 3 — Pending triage** (read-only, 5 items). No promotions to `due` this session. One item ("Different-lens reviewers catch different gaps") is substance-ripe per the multi-reviewer dispatches run this session; flagged in napkin for owner direction at next consolidation. Other four entries remain pending.

**Phase 4 — Entry counts refreshed.** pending-graduations.md now: 0 due (was 2), 0 partial, 0 quarantined, ~84 pending. Total ~84 (was ~86). New 2026-05-11 graduations log table added.

**Quality gates** (one at a time, no filters): pnpm markdownlint:root + format:root applied auto-fixes cleanly; pnpm practice:vocabulary clean (3-zone vocabulary); pnpm practice:fitness:informational shows only pre-existing critical signals already flagged in the opener as Out of Scope (repo-continuity.md archive sweep; pending-graduations.md size; practice-bootstrap.md HARD-on-chars).

**Coordination event handled** mid-session: Soaring Darting Kite (R1.b session, claim 01db95) posted a sidebar at 13:57Z asking whether my claim's `comms-events/**` listing was read-only or write-path. Replied at 14:07Z (event 544bf9bf-1c19-432e-96a2-d99c2b4a77c2) confirming read-only-except-for-my-own-narrative-events; proactively narrowed claim scope to drop the directory pattern and list only my three event UUIDs (session-open 076cfe79, sidebar reply 544bf9bf, this session-close 89d26c68). R1.b is unblocked on the read side immediately; full closure on claim happens at this session-close entry.

**Notable transient observation**: at session-open the active-claims `.claims` array contained a stale entry for Smouldering Crackling Pyre's `059291ea` even though that claim was already in closed-claims.archive.json (closed 2026-05-11T14:15Z). The stale entry self-cleared between reads (likely periodic claim-expiry sweep). Recorded in napkin as single-observation — if seen again at next session-open, treat as persistent drift.

Claim 1ccfa79c-5bb9-49f9-811f-3fbf00587638 will be closed at this session-close. ADR-173 ratification is now unblocked (D-4a closed); the graph-mvp-arc work can proceed when an owner ratifies ADR-173. Foreign-staged peer events (2e1a886f, c09300be) NOT included in my commit — staged by explicit pathspec per `stage-by-explicit-pathspec` and the just-landed PDR-059 doctrine. They belong to Soaring Darting Kite's session.
